messages.message: 🌙 EOD — EOD Recap — Monday, April 6, 2026 ✅ DONE TODAY: • Rebuild Home Base v3 with exact Line Card design • Add Fun Cartoon Characters to Home Base • CB Onboarding Document • (fix attempt 1): Norris Utilities Website Homepage • A/P Tracker Rebuild • FlexPro Armor Storefront • BSS Expense Report • PO Generator tab added to ops portal • Build Industry News Monitor • Rebuild Video Breakdown Table — Line Card Design • BSS Expense Report Template • n8n evaluation and setup • Contact Master List Framework • Samson Rope Dashboard • Voice Router • Folk CRM evaluation • AARON_VOICE.md created and integrated into followup_drafter.py + voice_router.py • Universal Capture System 💰 REVENUE STATUS: • 5 FlexPro Armor orders STILL UNINVOICED (March 20) 🧵 Samson: 8 unpaid invoices, $3,235.31 unbilled to customers 🔔 DEALS STATUS: ❄️ Skylift PO ($1.09M) — no activity in 7 days ❄️ EPB / Rick Sutherland (~$185K) — no activity in 7 days ❄️ Terex / Bill Kugler ($500K+) — no activity in 7 days ❄️ Sheffield / Waldrep — no activity in 7 days ❄️ Irby / Jared Lemoine — no activity in 7 days 👀 NEEDS YOUR REVIEW: • Agent task failed: FlexPro Armor Storefront Landing Page • Agent task failed: Norris Utilities Website Homepage • Agent task failed: Update Team Characters — Dynamic Subagent Animatio • 2 tasks in failed state — run --retry-failed when ready 🔜 QUEUED FOR TONIGHT: • Daily Journal System • Website About Page Have a great evening. 🤝
